message:
Command `# Still in synthesis — check the yosys synthesis log for progress
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
if [ -f "$SYNTH_LOG" ]; then
  echo "=== Synthesis log tail (last 20 lines) ==="
  tail -20 "$SYNTH_LOG"
  echo ""
  echo "Total synthesis log lines: $(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG")"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== Yosys PID still running? ==="
pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize.py" && echo "YES - Yosys running" || echo "Yosys done"` executed with exit code 0.

{"command": "# Still in synthesis — check the yosys synthesis log for progress
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
if [ -f "$SYNTH_LOG" ]; then
  echo "=== Synthesis log tail (last 20 lines) ==="
  tail -20 "$SYNTH_LOG"
  echo ""
  echo "Total synthesis log lines: $(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG")"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== Yosys PID still running? ==="
pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize.py" && echo "YES - Yosys running" || echo "Yosys done"", "timeout": 30}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# Still in synthesis — check the yosys synthesis log for progress
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
if [ -f "$SYNTH_LOG" ]; then
  echo "=== Synthesis log tail (last 20 lines) ==="
  tail -20 "$SYNTH_LOG"
  echo ""
  echo "Total synthesis log lines: $(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG")"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== Yosys PID still running? ==="
pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize.py" && echo "YES - Yosys running" || echo "Yosys done"
